summary: Full Stabilization Pass testing complete. All Settings Hub features verified: typography consistency (text-[11px] uppercase labels), Stamp Builder auto-pull from Business Profile, signature pad visibility, Sales/Affiliate source-of-truth banners, Document Template visual preview cards, Document Footer live preview. Track Order page code review confirms 6-step lifecycle timeline with fulfillment-aware CTA. Confirm Completion page regression passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings Hub Final Alignment Pass verified. Key features: (1) Typography consistency - all field labels use text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-400, section cards use text-lg font-bold for titles, (2) Stamp Builder auto-pull - shows AUTO-PULLED FROM BUSINESS PROFILE section with company name, location, registration, TIN from Business Profile, (3) Field visibility toggles for stamp (show company, location, reg, tin), (4) Sales & Affiliate tabs show blue info banners about Pricing Tiers being source of truth, (5) Document Template shows 4 visual preview cards (Classic Corporate, Modern Clean, Compact Commercial, Premium Branded), (6) Document Footer shows live preview with toggle options. Track Order timeline has 6 steps: Placed→Confirmed→In Progress→Ready/Dispatched→Awaiting Confirmation→Completed. Current step highlighted in gold (#D4A843).
